dialogueChunks.intro: Bad news, {player_name}. The situation just got more complicated.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rival collector heard about the {quest_item} you're after and sent their own team {location_hint}. They're stripping the area clean and they're not above violence to protect their claim. {target_npc} spotted them setting up a guarded camp near the main deposit. If we don't act fast, there won't be anything left to gather. Worse, their activity has stirred up the {enemy_type} in the area.
dialogueChunks.outro: Speed matters now more than ever. Get in, gather what you can, and get out before the competition or the creatures make it impossible.

playerResponses.text: Competition doesn't scare me. I'll be faster.
Rival teams and angry monsters? This just doubled in difficulty and so should my pay.
Too many parties fighting over the same prize. I'm out.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I wish I had better news to greet you with.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The {quest_item} you brought back? It's not the right quality. The impurities make it unusable for what I need. {target_npc} says there's a purer vein {location_hint}, but it's deeper underground and the tunnels are infested with {enemy_type}. I've also heard the cave system is unstable: collapses have been reported near the entrance. You'll need to find a way through without bringing the ceiling down.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'm sorry to send you back out. But without the right materials, everything we've done so far is wasted.

playerResponses.text: Unstable tunnels and monsters? Just another day. I'll find the pure vein.
Back into the caves for a second round. This is getting old.
I already risked my neck once. Find another source.

dialogueChunks.intro: Stop, stop, stop. Before you unpack, {player_name}, we have a problem.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: While you were out gathering, someone broke into the workshop and stole the {quest_item} I had already processed. Weeks of work, gone. {target_npc} saw a cloaked figure heading toward the old mill {location_hint} but was too afraid to follow. I suspect it's one of the traveling merchants who's been watching my work: they know the value of what I'm crafting. We need those processed materials back, and we need more raw {quest_item} to replace what can't be recovered.
dialogueChunks.outro: I'll reinforce the workshop. You track down the thief and recover what you can.

playerResponses.text: A thief? I'll find them and bring everything back.
Stolen goods on top of monster runs? My rate just went up.
Your security problems aren't my concern.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the route you've been using is gone. Completely impassable.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: A rockslide buried the trail {location_hint} overnight. The only alternative path cuts through a stretch of forest that {target_npc} says is thick with {enemy_type} this time of year. To make matters worse, the remaining {quest_item} we had stored was damaged by moisture when the storehouse roof leaked during the last storm. We need to replace it all and find a safe way through to the new source.
dialogueChunks.outro: Nature and bad luck keep piling on. But giving up now means losing everything we've invested.

playerResponses.text: Blocked trails and ruined stores? I'll carve a new path and restock everything.
Every step forward, something knocks us two steps back. Fine, I'll manage.
The universe is telling us to quit. I'm listening.
